scripts.typecheck: turbo run typecheck && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.base.json
scripts.format:check: prettier --check README*.md CHANGELOG.md CONTRIBUTING.md SECURITY.md docs plans
scripts.format: prettier --write README*.md CHANGELOG.md CONTRIBUTING.md SECURITY.md docs plans
scripts.qa:core: pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm evidence:check && pnpm build && pnpm performance:check && pnpm packages:smoke && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm validate
scripts.evidence:check: tsx scripts/sync-component-artifacts.mts --check && node scripts/sync-evidence-backlinks.mjs --check && tsx scripts/check-brand-evidence-stats.mts && tsx scripts/check-readme-parity.mts && tsx scripts/sync-brand-diagrams.mts --check
